settings.heading: Shipping
settings.lede: Shipping timelines and delivery updates for AltInstinct orders.

settings.title: Processing
settings.text: Orders are processed before dispatch. Limited drops can require additional handling time depending on production and fulfillment status.

settings.title: Tracking
settings.text: Tracking details are added to your order once the shipment is fulfilled. Login to your account or check your email confirmation for updates.
